locations.name: The Forum
locations.description: Sun-bleached stone, a restless crowd, and acoustics that forgive nothing.

event.name: The Echo
event.announcement: The colonnade catches the words — the next point lands twice as loud.

locations.name: The Studio
locations.description: Hot lights, cold coffee, and a debate stage built for television.

event.name: On the Air
event.announcement: The ON AIR light snaps on — for the next ten seconds, every rebuttal plays to the cameras.
